arts.ttl: Barcelona scores four goals in 24 minutes in Spanish league game against Valencia
arts.sum: Barcelona looks set to move within three points of second-place Atletico Madrid and seven points off leader Real Madrid, which won 3-0 at Valladolid on Saturday with a hat trick by Kylian Mbappé. Frenkie de Jong opened the scoring in the third minute, Ferran Torres added to the lead in the eighth, Raphinha found the net in the 14th and Fermín López completed the early rout in the 24th at Montjuic stadium.

arts.ttl: Pedri drops out of Barcelona squad before key week in LaLiga and Champions League
arts.sum: Given these circumstances, the coaching staff has decided to err on the side of caution, and Pedri is expected to miss the game entirely. Pedri, who reportedly had a rough night battling stomach discomfort, will not be joining the squad today.

arts.sum: Marcus Rashford prepared to take a wage cut to join Barcelona, Real Madrid show an interest in Jhon Duran, Newcastle plan new contract for Alexander Isak, plus more.
